debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ map (fun ω => u \ X ω) P = @ProbabilityTheory.bernoulliOn ι u (unitInterval.symm p)

proof:
by
    rw [bernoulliOn_eq_map, hX.map_eq, Measure.map_map]
    · congr with ω
      ext i
      simp [Set.mem_diff]
    · exact measurable_setOf
